title: bidens anthriscoides
intro: Bidens anthriscoides, also known as lopsided beggar-ticks or tickseed coreopsis, is a perennial herb native to the northeastern United States, with a history of traditional use in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bidens anthriscoides include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial protection, making it a potential remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. Bidens anthriscoides can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infusion for topical application, allowing for convenient and accessible use in herbal remedies.
